name: vaaya
description: Paid superpowers for any agent: media & video generation, product demo videos, web search & scraping, deep/market research, GTM & sales enrichment, code sandboxes, browser automation, email, memory — pay-per-call, no API keys.

interface.shortDescription: Paid superpowers for your agent — pay-per-call, no API keys.
interface.longDescription: Vaaya turns your agent into one that can buy what it needs. Instead of wiring up a dozen vendor API keys, the agent asks Vaaya's conversational consult tool for anything it can't do, gets back the exact call to run, and executes it with use — billed pay-per-call on success. Media & video generation, product demo videos, web search & scraping, deep/market research, GTM & lead enrichment, code sandboxes, browser automation, email, and memory. The agent never sees upstream URLs or API keys; failed calls are never charged.
defaultPrompt: Use Vaaya to generate a hero video for our landing page in 16:9.
Use Vaaya to find 50 heads of RevOps at Series-B SaaS companies with verified emails.
Use Vaaya to do deep research on our competitors with cited sources.
